name: cliff
description: Cliff — self-hosted cybersecurity remediation copilot. Plugins that let Claude Code drive the full remediation loop.

plugins.name: cliff-security
plugins.description: Drive Cliff from Claude Code: install, onboard credentials (GitHub PAT + AI provider key), run the full secure-this-repo loop (scan → plan → approve → PR → merge → close), or troubleshoot a broken install. Action-dispatched: one entrypoint routes to versioned per-action playbooks. Wraps the agent-shaped `cliffsec` CLI.
